creator: hsu@clinet.fi
text:
The machine was sitting dead and this was on the console:

panic: vm_page_free: freeing free page

dumping to dev 401, offset 0
dump Debugger("sddump: no slices") called
panic: vm_page_free: freeing free page

dumping to dev 401, offset 0
dump Debugger("sddump: no slices") called
panic: vm_page_free: freeing free page

dumping to dev 401, offset 0
dump Debugger("sddump: no slices") called
panic: vm_page_free: freeing free page

dumping to dev 401, offset 0
dump Debugger("sddump: no slices") called

No vmcore was saved in boot.

How-To-Repeat: 
	Don't know.
